tooling_note: Use this only after newspaper.png exists. The model ID is gpt-image-2. In Codex, the available surface may be the built-in image_gen tool rather than a tool literally named gpt-image-2.
common_prompt_template: Transform this image into a {style}. Preserve the original newspaper layout and composition. Replace pixel-art rendering with clean vector-like shapes and smooth airbrush gradients. Use neon accents, geometric architecture, large flat color areas, sharp sunlight shadows, simplified forms, minimal details, calm spacious atmosphere, tropical color palette, clean edges, retro editorial illustration style.
